'''Muntiadu''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Eriadu system/Legends|Eriadu system]], located in the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The planet and its [[Star system/Legends|star system]] were located on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]] known as [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], [[Lipsec Run/Legends|Lipsec Run]], [[Nothoiin Corridor]], [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]], [[Senex Trace]], and [[Yankirk Route]]. Muntiadu occupied the first [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Eriadu (star)|Eriadu]] and had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It featured a [[Magma/Legends|molten rock]] surface and a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] climate.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Muntiadu was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square M-18.<ref name="TEA" />
